title: bicchia albida
intro: Bicchia albida, also known as white vetchling or hairy bitter vetch, is a perennial legume native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bicchia albida include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make infusions, tinctures, or decoctions that can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat skin issues.
